description.overview: The Royal Dog of Scotland, Deerhounds are gentle, dignified sighthounds. They're quiet, polite house dogs despite their impressive size.
description.history: The Scottish Deerhound originated in Scotland.
description.temperament: Known for being gentle, dignified, polite.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their harsh, wiry coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The Royal Dog of Scotland, Deerhounds are gentle, dignified sighthounds. They're quiet, polite house dogs despite their impressive size.
